name: craft-layer
description: Create unique, animated, informative web apps (CRM, SaaS, landing pages) across React, Tailwind, Vite, Vue, Next, Nuxt, and Laravel: a /craft-layer:craft orchestrator chains design-research, token + component build, and a tiered motion-decision system (Framer Motion, anime.js, Three.js/R3F, sprites — each with a perf budget and prefers-reduced-motion fallback), plus sprite-motion and information-design skills and a /craft-layer:audit. Reuses the ui-ux and threejs skills.
